input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixNFTokenDirV1.

source_facts.claim: fixNFTokenDirV1: This amendment fixes an off-by-one error that occurred in some corner cases when determining which NFTokenPage a NFToken object belongs on. It also adjusts the constraints of NFTokenPage invariant checks, so that certain error cases fail with a suitable error code such as tecNO_SUITABLE_TOKEN_PAGE instead of failing with a tecINVARIANT_FAILED error code. This amendment has no effect unless the NonFungibleTokensV1 amendment is enabled. This amendment is obsolete because its effects are included as part of NonFungibleTokensV1_1.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixNFTokenDirV1 appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 1.9.1.
XRPSCAN currently reports support count 0 of 35 validations, threshold 28, and no enabled ledger entry for fixNFTokenDirV1.
Known Amendments status for fixNFTokenDirV1 is obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
